modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble uploading profile picture in Microsoft Office account

full_description_text:  
I am trying to upload my profile picture to my Microsoft Office account but it’s not working. I go to the settings and click on the upload button, but nothing happens. I’m using Outlook 365 and Office 365, and I really don’t know what I’m doing wrong. It’s just really confusing and I need help with this picture thing!
